globalblocking-apierror-badip: Cinwaanka IP $1 ma aha mid sax ah
globalblocking-apierror-cannot-modify-gl: Ma beddeli kartid xannibaadaha tooska ah ee caalamiga ah
apihelp-globalblock-summary: Xannib ama ka qaad xannibaad isticmaale caalami ahaan.
apihelp-globalblock-param-id: Aqoonsiga xannibaadda caalamiga ah ee la beddelayo ama laga qaadayo (waxaa laga helaa <kbd>list=globalblocks</kbd>). Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaanta <var>$1target</var>.
apihelp-globalblock-param-target: Cinwaanka IP-ga ama magaca isticmaale ee la beegsanayo. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaanta <var>$1id</var>.
apihelp-globalblock-param-expiry: Haddii la cayimo, waxay xannibi doontaa ama dib u xannibi doontaa isticmaalaha. Waxay go’aamisaa muddada xannibaaddu socon doonto, tusaale ahaan "5 bilood" ama "2 toddobaad". Haddii loo dejiyo "aan dhammaanayn" ama "aan xad lahayn", xannibaaddu waligeed ma dhammaan doonto.
apihelp-globalblock-param-unblock: Haddii la cayimo, waxay ka qaadi doontaa xannibaadda isticmaalaha.
apihelp-globalblock-param-anononly: Cadee tan haddii xannibaaddu ay kaliya saameynayso isticmaaleyaasha aan soo gelin  caalami ahaan.
apihelp-globalblock-param-allow-account-: Cadee tan haddii xannibaadda caalamiga ah aysan ka hor istaagayn abuurista xisaab cusub.
apihelp-globalblock-param-enable-autoblo: Cadee tan haddii xannibaadda caalamiga ah ay kiciso xannibaado toos ah oo caalami ah.
apihelp-globalblock-param-modify: Cadee tan haddii xannibaadda hore ee bartilmaameedka la beddelayo.
apihelp-globalblock-example-1: Xannib 192.0.2.1 si aan xad lahayn iyadoo sababtu tahay "Isticmaal xun oo ka dhaca wiki-yada kala duwan"
apihelp-query+globalblocks-summary: Liis garee dhammaan cinwaannada IP-ga ee caalamiyan loo xannibay.
apihelp-query+globalblocks-param-ids: Liis aqoonsiyo xannibaad oo lagu kala soocay calaamadda.
apihelp-query+globalblocks-param-address: Liis cinwaanno IP ah oo lagu kala soocay si loo raadiyo.
apihelp-query+globalblocks-param-targets: Liis magacyo isticmaale, cinwaanno IP ah, ama xaddidaad IP ah oo lagu kala soocay si loo raadiyo. Si aad u raadiso xannibaadaha IP ee ku jira xaddidaad gaar ah, isticmaal $1ip halkii.
apihelp-query+globalblocks-param-ip: Soo hel dhammaan xannibaadaha ku saabsan cinwaankan IP ama xadka CIDR, oo ay ku jiraan xannibaadaha xadka. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaanta $1addresses ama $1targets. Xaddidyada CIDR ee ka ballaaran /16 lama aqbalo.
apihelp-query+globalblocks-param-limit: Tirada ugu badan ee xannibaadaha la soo bandhigi karo.
apihelp-query+globalblocks-param-prop: Guryaha la rabo in la soo helo.
apihelp-query+globalblocks-paramvalue-pr: Waxay ku daraysaa aqoonsiga xannibaadda caalamiga ah.
Waxay ku daraysaa bartilmaameedka xannibaadda caalamiga ah.
Waxay ku daraysaa bartilmaameedka xannibaadda caalamiga ah. Hantidan hadda waa la joojiyay waxaana lagu beddelay 'target'.
Waxay ku daraysaa magaca isticmaale ee sameeyay xannibaadda, iyo wiki-ga uu ka sameeyay xannibaadda caalamiga ah.
Waxay ku daraysaa waqtiga xannibaadda caalamiga ah la bixiyay.
Waxay ku daraysaa waqtiga uu dhacayo xannibaadda caalamiga ah.
Waxay ku daraysaa sababta loo bixiyay xannibaadda caalamiga ah.
Waxay ku daraysaa xadka cinwaannada IP ee uu saameeyo xannibaadda caalamiga ah (lama soo daro haddii xannibaaddu aysan bartilmaameedsan cinwaanno IP ah).
apihelp-query+globalblocks-example-1: Liis garee dhammaan xannibaadaha caalamiga ah.
apihelp-query+globalblocks-example-2: Liis garee xannibaadaha caalamiga ah ee ku khuseeya cinwaanka IP 192.0.2.18
apihelp-globalblock-param-alsolocal: Isticmaalaha sidoo kale si maxalli ah u xannib. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaanta <var>$1id</var>.
apihelp-globalblock-param-localblockstal: Ka qaad gelitaanka bogga wada hadalka si maxalli ah. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaanta <var>$1id</var>.
apihelp-globalblock-param-localblocksema: Ka qaad awoodda dirista iimaylka si maxalli ah. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaanta <var>$1id</var>.
apihelp-globalblock-param-localanononly: Cadee tan haddii xannibaaddu ay kaliya saameyneyso isticmaaleyaasha aan soo gelin si maxalli ah. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaanta <var>$1id</var>.
apihelp-globalblock-param-local-allow-ac: Cadee tan haddii xannibaadda maxalliga ah aysan ka hor istaagayn abuurista xisaab cusub. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaanta <var>$1id</var>.
